name: @openagentsinc/openagents-desktop
description: OpenAgents — Effect Native application on an Electron host (#8574).

scripts.make:mac: node --import tsx scripts/prepare-macos-maker.ts && node --import tsx scripts/stage-and-package.ts --target darwin-arm64 --mode make
scripts.live-proof: node --import tsx scripts/build.ts && node --import tsx scripts/run-live-proof.ts
scripts.mvp-proof: node --import tsx scripts/build.ts && node --import tsx scripts/run-mvp-proof.ts
scripts.smoke:react: node --import tsx scripts/build.ts && OPENAGENTS_DESKTOP_SMOKE=1 OPENAGENTS_DESKTOP_SMOKE_REACT=1 electron .
scripts.smoke:headed: node --import tsx scripts/build.ts && OPENAGENTS_DESKTOP_SMOKE=1 OPENAGENTS_DESKTOP_HEADED=1 electron .
scripts.qa:visual: node --import tsx scripts/build.ts && node --import tsx scripts/visual-baseline-smoke.ts
scripts.ide:package-spike: OPENAGENTS_DESKTOP_IDE_PACKAGE_SPIKE_BUILD=1 OA_DESKTOP_SKIP_DEV_VOICE_HELPER=1 node --import tsx scripts/build.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ide-package-spike-smoke.ts
scripts.verify:ide-01: pnpm run ide:package-spike && pnpm run ide:package-audit && pnpm run ide:typescript-index-benchmark && pnpm run typecheck && vp test --run --root ../.. src/ide/package-admission.test.ts && pnpm run check:ide-boundaries
scripts.verify:ide-02: pnpm run ide:path-index-benchmark && pnpm run typecheck && vp test --run --root ../.. src/ide/path-index-service.test.ts src/ide/path-index-benchmark-contract.test.ts src/renderer/ide/pierre-tree-adapter.test.ts src/renderer/workspace-browser.test.ts tests/workspace-service.test.ts tests/ide-explorer-accessibility.test.tsx && pnpm run check:ide-boundaries
scripts.verify:ide-03: pnpm run build && pnpm run ide:monaco-benchmark && pnpm run typecheck && vp test --run --root ../.. src/ide/monaco-document-contract.test.ts src/renderer/workspace-editor.test.ts src/renderer/react-primitive-adapters.test.tsx tests/desktop-preferences.test.ts tests/startup-contract.test.ts tests/accessibility.test.ts packages/behavior-contracts/src/behavior-contracts.test.ts && pnpm run check:ide-boundaries
scripts.verify:ide-04: pnpm run build && pnpm run ide:workbench-benchmark && pnpm run typecheck && vp test --run --root ../.. src/ide/workbench-contract.test.ts src/ide/monaco-document-contract.test.ts src/renderer/workspace-editor.test.ts src/renderer/workspace-browser.test.ts src/renderer/ide/pierre-tree-adapter.test.ts src/renderer/react-primitive-adapters.test.tsx src/renderer/command-shortcuts.test.ts tests/desktop-command-contract.test.ts tests/desktop-command-bindings.test.ts tests/ide-explorer-accessibility.test.tsx tests/accessibility.test.ts packages/behavior-contracts/src/behavior-contracts.test.ts && pnpm run check:ide-boundaries
scripts.verify:ide-05: pnpm run build && pnpm run ide:review-benchmark && pnpm run typecheck && vp test --run --root ../.. src/ide/project-contract.test.ts src/ide/review-contract.test.ts src/ide/package-admission.test.ts src/git-github-contract.test.ts src/git-github-host.test.ts src/git-review-corpus.node.test.ts src/renderer/git-panel.test.ts src/renderer/react-review.test.tsx src/renderer/react-review-sheet.test.tsx src/renderer/react-primitive-adapters.test.tsx tests/electron-boundary.test.ts tests/accessibility.test.ts packages/behavior-contracts/src/behavior-contracts.test.ts && pnpm run check:ide-boundaries
scripts.verify:ide-06: pnpm run build && pnpm run ide:language-benchmark && pnpm run typecheck && vp test --run --root ../.. src/ide/language-contract.test.ts src/ide/language-workbench-contract.test.ts src/ide/language-service.test.ts src/ide/monaco-document-contract.test.ts src/ide/workbench-contract.test.ts src/renderer/workspace-editor.test.ts tests/electron-boundary.test.ts tests/accessibility.test.ts packages/behavior-contracts/src/behavior-contracts.test.ts && pnpm run check:ide-boundaries
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build && OPENAGENTS_DESKTOP_SMOKE=1 pnpm run smoke && pnpm run smoke:react
